assertion: every accepted intent record's wired_to target resolves to a present rls_policy topology node AND that node has attributes.enabled==true — the promised security control is still actively wired. HONEST SCOPE (Gate 3 / Doctrine 06 §7.2 / A.6): proves the control is ACTIVE (the disabled-but-present silent-failure class), NOT that its USING/CHECK predicate logic is correct (a richer invariant requiring the supabase-live emitter to capture the policy expression — named, not claimed by v1).
source_of_truth_ref: the conservation demonstrator — intent's wired_to (the promised RLS policy node id) vs the live topology rls_policy node + its attributes.enabled (Doctrine 06 §6.4.3 / §7.2). left_source:intent resolves the left_view from INTENT_SUBSTRATE_PATH (council A2/D7); existing versioning/derivation invariants OMIT left_source → topology default → byte-unchanged.
